title: icecream hunger bar
description: turns normal hunger bar icons to ice cream!
body:
This resource pack turns normal hunger bar icons into **_vanilla_** ice cream!
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bf247abf7a19352770918730b2f9d631441354f.png)

**Other flavors are available too:**
- [chocolate flavored](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/chocolate-icecream-hunger-bar)
